channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Van blocking communal access to rear of property, 23rd April
item.description:
Unable to access rear of my property for deliveries or to garages.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockman Rise, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped carpet, 23rd April
item.description:
Carpet , broken furniture and other items dumped opposite 191 Ravensbourne Avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post, 23rd April
item.description:
A lamp post has been hit this morning opposite 45 and is leaning at a 30 degree angle, needs urgent attention
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Grove, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old tyre and rubbish bags dumped, 23rd April
item.description:
An old tyre has been dumped here along with 2 rubbish bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Park, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas canisters, rubbish and chair close to 170 Old Woolwich Road, 23rd April
item.description:
These have been on the street for over a week, great if you can pick them up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cricklewood Broadway opposite Crown, 23rd April
item.description:
Grafitti on bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy street, 23rd April
item.description:
Litter in street. Needs cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue rubbish bag dumped on street, 23rd April
item.description:
Bag has opened and rubbish including used children nappy spread on the sidewalk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Winterbrook Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 23rd April
item.description:
Outside 33 Grayling Rd, N16 0BL

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grayling Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste bins, 23rd April
item.description:
These bins have been left in the street for ages. I have reported on here before and received an email to say it has been remedied. Children kicked one bin down the street and the water spilled everywhere. The grey bin is still full of weeks old waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cranwich Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car attracting undesirables!, 23rd April
item.description:
Car has been here for months, dumped in a loading bay - parked badly - a truck can no longer access the bay to unload for our business. Driver window has been knocked out & covered & taped & then regularly ripped & the recovered presumably by the owner.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hemsworth Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 x black sacks by bin in Bristow Rd/Pickford Lane B'Heath, 23rd April
item.description:
4 x black sacks by bin in Bristow Rd/Pickford Lane B'Heath - Yet again 4 black bags have been dumped by the bin in Bristow Road/pickford end and if they are not collected as a matter of urgency the foxes will rip them open and scatter the contents over the pavement road and grass area .can they please be removed urgently Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mud and leaves all along pathway, 23rd April
item.description:
Mud and leaves have been left along this pathway for a few months now, when it rains the area becomes a swamp. All the janitors meet up here every day so must be aware of it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Byron Close, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Quantity of medical equiptment dumped on pavement, 23rd April
item.description:
A substantial quantity of medical equipment including syringes ( appear unused ) has been dumped on the pavement at the start of Tilbury Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Tilbury Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall and on handrail, 23rd April
item.description:
Graffiti on wall and handrail in the underground car park beside the Cutty Sark, with the London Marathon coming through this area it would be helpful for it to be as pristine as possible before Sunday.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cutty Sark Gardens, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Knifes and rubbish, 23rd April
item.description:
A neighbour keeps chucking rubbish over the balcony, cat litter bags and knifes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Samuel Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip by the green box outside William Bearfoot Gardens, 23rd April
item.description:
Fly tip overnight

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alliance Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge flag on public green space, 23rd April
item.description:
Weaponiszed st Georges flag (with cartoon knight to really ramp up the aggression) flag on public green space. Causes upset and harm to local community. Must be removed ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmerside Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on collection day outside 26-28 Sandringham road, 23rd April
item.description:
Today is bin collection day and there are two bags left in our street. They will remain until next week and will be opened by foxes and rats. Please remove them now. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside 133 Eglinton Road, 23rd April
item.description:
Large amount of flytipping outside this property
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
